Name: FOOT_EFFECT_SFX_PARAM
Description: Defines footstep effect based on surface material types.

Fields.Name: None
Fields.Description: No footstep effect.

Fields.Name: Iron
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for standard metal surfaces.

Fields.Name: Heavy Iron
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for dense or thick metal surfaces.

Fields.Name: Wood
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for wooden surfaces such as planks or floors.

Fields.Name: Water
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for shallow water surfaces.

Fields.Name: Swamp
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for muddy swamp terrain.

Fields.Name: Lumber
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for processed wood or stacked lumber.

Fields.Name: Living Flesh
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for organic flesh-like surfaces.

Fields.Name: Dead Flesh
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for decomposed or lifeless flesh-like surfaces.

Fields.Name: Insect
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for chitinous or insect-like surfaces.

Fields.Name: Giant
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for massive creature-like surfaces.

Fields.Name: Bone
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for bone or skeletal surfaces.

Fields.Name: Copper
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for copper or similar metal surfaces.

Fields.Name: Energy
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for energy field or magical energy surfaces.

Fields.Name: Fire
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for fiery or burning surfaces.

Fields.Name: Thunder
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for electrical or lightning-infused surfaces.

Fields.Name: Dark
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for dark or void-like energy surfaces.

Fields.Name: Magic
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for magical or enchanted surfaces.

Fields.Name: Stone
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for rocky or stone surfaces.

Fields.Name: Dirt
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for soil or earth surfaces.

Fields.Name: Carpet
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for fabric carpet surfaces.

Fields.Name: Grass
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for grassy terrain.

Fields.Name: Gravel
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for loose gravel surfaces.

Fields.Name: Cloth
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for fabric or cloth surfaces.

Fields.Name: Sand
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for sandy terrain.

Fields.Name: Ash
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for ash-covered ground.

Fields.Name: Poison Swamp
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for toxic or poisonous swamp terrain.

Fields.Name: Oil
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for slippery oil-covered surfaces.

Fields.Name: Coal Tar
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for sticky coal tar surfaces.

Fields.Name: Lava
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for molten lava surfaces.

Fields.Name: Spider Web
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for web-like or stringy surfaces.

Fields.Name: Sulfur Crystal
Fields.Description: Footstep effect for crystalline sulfur formations.

Fields.Name: Foot Effect 33
Fields.Description: Unused or custom footstep effect slot.
